_comment: shortform-repurposing converts a long-form project into a full short-form content package.
description: 3 to 5 Shorts/Reels, per-platform captions, hashtag sets, Pinterest Pins, and a drop schedule from a long-form project.
note: The ecosystem ratio is 1 long-form + 3 to 5 Shorts/Reels + 1 to 3 Pins per project. caption-write flags FTC disclosure when content is sponsored, gifted, or affiliate. shorts-reframe follows short-extract: chosen clip range in, 9:16 crop geometry (and optional flag-gated local render) out.
